results.title: Twin quakes collapse Caracas buildings, Venezuela declares emergency
results.description: New Delhi: Venezuela declared a state of emergency after two powerful earthquakes struck near its Caribbean coast on Wednesday evening, collapsing buildings in Caracas, damaging the country’s main airport and triggering tsunami alerts across parts of the Caribbean. The U.S. Geological Survey said the first earthquake had a magnitude of 7.2 and was centred west of Morón on Venezuela’s Caribbean coast, about 168 km west of Caracas. It had a depth of 22 km. A second and stronger earthquake of magnitude 7.5 struck seconds later near the same area. Its epicentre was about 16 km southwest of Morón, at a depth of 10 km. The tremors sent residents rushing out of buildings in Caracas. Several structures collapsed or suffered major damage, with debris blocking streets in some areas. Emergency crews responded to collapsed buildings in parts of the capital, including Altamira and Los Palos Grandes. Reports said multiple people were injured and rescue workers were searching through rubble. Acting President Delcy Rodríguez declared a state of emergency after the twin quakes. She extended condolences to the families of those killed, but authorities had not released an official figure for deaths or injuries in the immediate aftermath. Interior Minister Diosdado Cabello said the quake was felt in several states and urged residents to remain outside because aftershocks could further damage weakened structures. The impact was also felt at Simón Bolívar International Airport in Maiquetía, near Caracas. Rodríguez said the airport had been closed after sustaining damage during the earthquakes. Photos and videos from the airport showed ceiling panels and debris on the floor. Flights were suspended as authorities assessed the damage. The U.S. Pacific Tsunami Warning Center issued tsunami alerts for parts of the Caribbean after the quakes. Alerts and advisories affected the Virgin Islands, Puerto Rico and the Dominican Republic. The advisory for Puerto Rico and the U.S. Virgin Islands was later cancelled. Officials said the initial concern was over possible sea-level fluctuations and strong ocean currents near coastal areas. The quakes were felt beyond Venezuela. The Associated Press reported evacuations from buildings as far away as Brazil’s Amazon, about 1,700 km from the affected region. Tremors were also felt in parts of Colombia, though there were no immediate reports of damage there. The U.S. Geological Survey issued a red alert for potential fatalities, saying high casualties and extensive damage were probable and that the disaster was likely to be widespread. The warning added urgency to rescue work in Caracas and nearby coastal areas, where damaged buildings, power cuts and weak communication networks complicated the first response. The earthquake sequence is among the strongest to hit Venezuela in more than a century. Venezuela lies near the boundary between the Caribbean and South American plates, but earthquakes of this scale are rare compared with the more active Pacific coast of Latin America.

results.title: JD.com targets 700,000 workers for retraining as robots reshape logistics
results.description: Founder and chairman of Chinese e-commerce platform JD.com Qiangdong Liu said at the 2026 APEC Business Leaders China Forum that logistics and delivery work will gradually be handled by robots, with many courier jobs likely to be replaced by automation. He added that JD.com has launched an internal program called the "Nirvana Plan" to help about 700,000 logistics and blue-collar employees retrain and transition as AI reshapes the industry.

results.title: TIGER IN WAYANAD TIGER ATTACKED ANIMALS TIGER CAPTURED IN WAYANAD MUTHANGA FOREST DEPARTMENT CAPTURED TIGER
results.description: വയനാട്: കഴിഞ്ഞ രണ്ട് മാസമായി വയനാട് മുത്തങ്ങ ചിറമൂല ഉന്നതിവാസികളെ വിറപ്പിച്ച കടുവ ഭീതിക്ക് ആശ്വാസം. ഉന്നതിയിലെ എട്ട് ആടുകളെ കൊന്ന് ഭക്ഷിച്ച കടുവയെയാണ് ഇപ്പോൾ വനംവകുപ്പ് പിടികൂടിയിരിക്കുന്നത്. പകൽ സമയങ്ങളിൽ പോലും ഉടമകളുടെ കൺമുന്നിൽവച്ച് ആടുകളെ കടുവ പിടികൂടി കൊണ്ടുപോയിട്ടുണ്ട്. ഇതോടെ പ്രദേശവാസികൾ വലിയ ആശങ്കയിലായിരുന്നു.ചിറമൂല ഉന്നതിയിലെ കറുപ്പൂട്ടി, പാഞ്ചാലി എന്നിവരുടെ മൂന്നു വീതം ആടുകളെയും, മാരൻ, ശ്രീധരൻ എന്നിവരുടെ ഓരോ ആടുകളെയുമാണ് കഴിഞ്ഞ രണ്ട് മാസത്തിനിടെ കടുവ പിടികൂടി കൊന്ന് ഭക്ഷിച്ചത്. ഏറ്റവുമൊടുവിൽ സമീപത്തെ കോളൂർ ഉന്നതിയിലെ രതീഷിൻ്റെ പശുക്കിടാവിനെയും കടുവ പിടികൂടി കൊന്നിരുന്നു. ഇതോടെ പകൽ സമയങ്ങളിൽ പോലും പുറത്തിറങ്ങാൻ ആളുകൾ ഭയപ്പെട്ടിരുന്നു. ഇതിനിടെയാണ് വനംവകുപ്പ് സ്ഥാപിച്ച കൂട്ടിൽ കടുവ വന്നുപെടുന്നത്. ഇതോടെ ആശ്വാസത്തിലായിരിക്കുകയാണ് ഉന്നതിവാസികൾ.ഉന്നതിക്ക് സമീപത്തായാണ് മുത്തങ്ങ ഗവ. എൽപി സ്‌കൂൾ സ്ഥിതിചെയ്യുന്നത്. അതിനാൽ തന്നെ കടുവ നിരന്തരം ഭീതിവിതയ്ക്കാൻ തുടങ്ങിയതോടെ രക്ഷിതാക്കളടക്കം ഭീതിയിലായിരുന്നു. ഇതേത്തുടർന്ന് ജനപ്രതിനിധികളും വിവിധ രാഷ്ട്രീയ കക്ഷി നേതാക്കളും പ്രതിഷേധം ശക്തമാക്കിയതോടെയാണ് കഴിഞ്ഞ ദിവസം വനംവകുപ്പ് കടുവയെ പിടികൂടാനായി കൂട് സ്ഥാപിച്ചത്.
